expertAssessments.rationale: Boundary clarification short-circuiting is fixed in production, but inverse healthy-status metadata still uses Analyst Agent because getIntentCategory matches the broad anomaly substring before inverse status patterns.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Prioritize inverse healthy-status filters before anomaly regex in getIntentCategory, redeploy, and rerun the six direct API boundary prompts.
